business.title: Berger Paints Q4 profit jumps 27% to Rs 335 crore on strong demand and margins
business.summary: Berger Paints reported a strong 27% rise in quarterly profit driven by higher volumes, improved product mix, and robust gross margins. Revenue and EBITDA also grew, though the company flagged risks from crude volatility, currency depreciation, and geopolitical disruptions impacting costs and inflation.

business.title: Kalpataru FY26 pre-sales up 17% to Rs 5,280 cr; Q4 net profit at Rs 194 cr
business.summary: Kalpataru delivered its strongest operational performance with record pre-sales, collections, and profit growth driven by strong demand across Mumbai projects. Improved sale realisations, robust project completions, and debt reduction strengthened the developer’s financial position despite accounting-related revenue recognition timing differences.

business.title: India gets its UPI for EV charging as Kumaraswamy unveils unified Bharat e-charge

business.title: Tractor sales begin FY27 with 27% jump in April on strong rural sentiment
business.summary: This is the second consecutive month that domestic tractor sales have crossed the one lakh mark

business.title: Dixon Tech Q4 profit falls 36% despite revenue growth and expansion plans
business.summary: Dixon Technologies reported a sharp decline in quarterly profit due to weak consumer demand, rising component costs, and the end of PLI benefits. Despite margin pressure, the company expects strong FY27 growth driven by smartphone manufacturing, telecom equipment, exports, and IT hardware expansion.

business.title: Plan for PMIS: Final year diploma students to be eligible Cos can go to campus to pick up interns

business.title: Nexus Select Trust Q4 net operating income up 11% at Rs 440 crore
business.summary: Nexus Select Trust reported strong quarterly growth driven by rising tenant sales, stable occupancy, and higher retail income across key consumption categories. The retail REIT expanded its portfolio through acquisitions and development deals while maintaining healthy payouts and guiding continued distribution growth for FY27.
